name: parallax
description: Governed trading thesis council with lifecycle monitoring, paper trading, and permissioned execution gates.

scripts.analyze: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js analyze
scripts.policy: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js policy
scripts.library: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js library
scripts.watchlist: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js watchlist
scripts.app: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js app
scripts.data-status: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js data-status
scripts.demo: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js analyze --symbol NVDA --horizon swing --thesis "post-earnings continuation with controlled risk" --ceiling watchlist
